pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 12 sets APP_DIR="/home/ga/legacy-app" and creates directory structure at this path

Official Docker Hub image from OWASP project (https://hub.docker.com/r/owasp/modsecurity-crs/). GitHub repository: https://github.com/coreruleset/modsecurity-crs-docker. Image exists on Docker Hub with layer details and is a reverse proxy that uses BACKEND environment variable for upstream configuration
Task description requires app at http://localhost:8080; setup_task.sh line 74 maps 8080:5000; export_result.sh tests use port 8080

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a WAF sidecar protection pattern for a vulnerable Flask application. The vulnerable HR dashboard is created synthetically with an in-memory SQLite database containing 3 hardcoded employee records and a SQL injection vulnerability on the root endpoint at '/'. The Flask app runs on internal port 5000 and must be protected by the official OWASP ModSecurity Core Rule Set Docker image (owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx) which acts as a reverse proxy. The application must be accessible on host port 8080 through the WAF, with legitimate queries (e.g., '?q=Alice') returning 200 OK and SQL injection attacks (e.g., '?q=' OR 1=1') blocked with 403 Forbidden. The task directory is /home/ga/legacy-app and uses docker-compose.yml for orchestration.
